---
name: Bug report
about: Something in Smart Blur isn't working as expected
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: vicky-repo-1904

---

## What went wrong?
Brief description of the bug (e.g. "Blur doesn't apply on example.com", "AI scan never finishes", "Panel won't open").

## Steps to reproduce
1. Open a webpage: (e.g. example.com or "any page")
2. Click the Smart Blur icon to open the panel
3. (Manual) Turn on **Manual Mode** — add keyword / pattern / use **Click to Blur** or **Draw to Blur** — …
4. (AI) Turn on **AI Mode** — wait for model load / run scan — …
5. …

What happened at the end (error, nothing blurred, wrong behavior)?

## Expected vs actual
- **Expected:** (e.g. "The email should be blurred" / "Panel should show 'Protection Active'")
- **Actual:** (e.g. "Text stays visible" / "Panel stays minimized" / "Console error: …")

## Smart Blur setup (when the bug happened)
- **Protection:** Manual only / AI only / Both
- **Manual:** Keywords? Preset patterns (email, SSN, etc.)? Custom regex? Click-to-blur / Draw-to-blur?
- **AI:** First time loading model or already loaded? Any errors in the panel (e.g. "Failed to trigger the AI mode scan")?
- **Pro:** Free or Pro? (Only matters if the bug involves AI Mode, Save per page, or Import/Export.)
- **Where it happened:** Floating panel (popup) / Advanced Settings (options page) / On a specific site

## Page / site (if relevant)
- **URL or site:** (e.g. https://example.com/contact or "any site")
- **Only on this site or everywhere?**

## Environment
- **Smart Blur version:** (see Advanced Settings → bottom of left sidebar, e.g. v1.0.0)
- **Chrome version:** (from `chrome://version`)
- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11)

## Screenshots, console errors, or screen recording
- If the panel or options page shows an error, attach a screenshot.
- If you see a red error in the console (e.g. right‑click extension icon → "Inspect popup" or DevTools on the page), paste the message or a screenshot.
- For "blur not working" on a page, a before/after screenshot or short screen recording helps.

## Anything else?
E.g. only after refresh, only when panel was minimized first, only with 10+ keywords, etc.
